summary: Integrated ADR 0211 into repo release 0.177.35 on top of the concurrent 0.177.34 mainline, replayed the governed `headscale` production path from the merged-main candidate, and advanced the canonical live platform state to 0.130.37 with one machine-checkable shared policy registry governing redundancy, capacity-class, and placement rules.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_shared_policy_packs.py tests/test_capacity_report.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_standby_capacity.py tests/test_failure_domain_policy.py` returned `27 passed in 0.40s` on the integrated candidate.

verification.check: Governed headscale preflights on the merged-main candidate
verification.observed: `scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:headscale`, `scripts/standby_capacity.py --service headscale`, `scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service headscale`, and `scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service headscale` all passed from `codex/ws-0211-main-merge` before the replay.

The governed replay `playbooks/services/headscale.yml` completed successfully from the integrated ADR 0211 mainline candidate later recut as repo release `0.177.35`, with `localhost ok=16 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=71 changed=4 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=42 changed=0 failed=0`.

verification.check: Public Headscale health path after merged-main replay
verification.observed: `curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' https://headscale.lv3.org/health` and `curl -Ik https://headscale.lv3.org/health` returned `HTTP 200` after the merged-main replay, preserving the shared edge security headers and `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`.

verification.check: Integrated repo automation and generated-artifact validation
verification.observed: The expanded regression slice `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_dependency_graph.py tests/test_shared_policy_packs.py tests/test_capacity_report.py tests/test_service_redundancy.py tests/test_standby_capacity.py tests/test_failure_domain_policy.py` returned `33 passed`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models generated-docs generated-portals agent-standards` passed on the rebased `0.177.35` candidate after harmonizing the dependency-graph page renderer shared by `scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py` and `scripts/generate_docs_site.py` and refreshing the generated architecture diagrams.

notes: The branch-local workstream receipt remains preserved as the first direct isolated-worktree replay, but this merged-main receipt is the canonical source of truth for release `0.177.35` and platform version `0.130.37`.

The earlier fresh-worktree artifact gap discovered on the live-apply branch remains relevant operational evidence: `lv3.platform.nginx_edge_publication` requires the generated `build/changelog-portal/` and `build/docs-portal/` directories, so the integrated replay was preceded by `make generate-ops-portal generate-changelog-portal docs` from the main-merge worktree.

Final integration verification also aligned the standalone dependency-graph writer with the docs-site generator so `generated-docs` and `generated-portals` now validate the same committed dependency-graph page format.
